title: cleistanthus collinus
intro: Cleistanthus collinus, also known as the Indian spurge, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer activities. The health benefits of Cleistanthus collinus include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Cleistanthus collinus include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
